title: A New Nail Polish for Using Phones with Long Nails
summary: Scientists are making a special clear nail polish that lets people with long nails use touchscreens like phones and tablets easily. Usually, long nails don't work on screens because they are not conductive, meaning they can't carry electricity like fingertips do. This new polish has safe ingredients that make nails conductive so they can touch the screen. It was invented by a student named Manasi Desai and her teacher Joshua Lawrence at Centenary College. They wanted to solve a problem they saw when someone with long nails had trouble using a smartphone. The polish is clear, so it can go over any nail color or bare nails, helping people who have calluses too. They will share their findings at a big science meeting in 2026.

keywords.explanation: a special paint for nails that can make them work on touchscreens
screens on phones and tablets that you touch to use
able to carry electricity, like fingertips do
people who study and invent new things
see-through, so you can still see your nail color

Who else can this polish help besides people with long nails?

background_read: Touchscreens are common on devices like smartphones and tablets. They work by sensing electricity from your fingertip. Long nails are made of a material that doesn't conduct electricity, so they don't work on screens. Scientists are creating a clear nail polish with safe ingredients to make nails conductive, allowing them to touch screens. This helps people who have long nails or calluses use their devices more easily.
Article_Structure: WHO: Manasi Desai and Joshua Lawrence, scientists at Centenary College
WHAT: A clear nail polish that makes long nails work on touchscreens
WHERE: At Centenary College and a science meeting in 2026
WHY: To help people with long nails or calluses use phones and tablets easily

perspectives.description: The polish combines beauty with technology to solve a daily problem.
